posts.text:
Kim Hammer is a strong conservative, he's a pastor, and he's a man of integrity. 

He will make a great Secretary of State and I encourage every Arkansas Republican--get out and vote for Kim on the March 31st runoff election.

In 2020, Republicans and President Trump tried to refill the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at $20 a barrel. 

Chuck Schumer and Democrats blocked it from happening.

We do not share a political movement with anyone who traffics in antisemitism, promotes Liz Warren’s economic policies, or promotes Rashida Tlaib’s foreign policy.


National Review (@NRO)

.@SenTomCotton calls out "influencers" on the Right for antisemitism. #StopAntisemitism

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/NRO/status/2031371653255422088#m

Incredible. 

Talarico really does make Kamala Harris look like a social conservative.


Brandon Gill (@realBrandonGill)

HOST: "Something that you love that's not family or friends?"  

TALARICO: "Trans children."

Now that's just creepy.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/realBrandonGill/status/2031008922467778676#m

The Democrats' continued shutdown of DHS is a disgrace. 

They're causing massive suffering for millions of Americans. And forcing law enforcement (although not even ICE) to work without pay. 

Chuck Schumer should be ashamed of himself.
